title: [AI5] Prompt Hermes Agent to Generate NA10 MCP Connection Command
summary: Added a Hermes NA10 MCP command generator and exposed it through TNF MCP servers. The generated command preserves the exact Hermes prompt, routes through `tnf hermes`, uses NA10 URL/token placeholders, and avoids committing credentials.

verification.notes: Emitted JSON containing the safe TNF-routed Hermes command template.

verification.command: pnpm exec tsx -e "import { buildHermesNa10McpCommandPlan } from './src/mcp/hermes-na10-command.ts'; const plan = buildHermesNa10McpCommandPlan({ serverName: 'na10-test' }); if (!plan.command.includes('tnf hermes chat')) process.exit(1);"

pnpm exec tsc --ignoreConfig --noEmit --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --types node --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --allowSyntheticDefaultImports src/mcp/hermes-na10-command.ts src/mcp/server.ts src/mcp/enhanced-tnf-mcp-server.ts src/mcp/complete-api-mcp-server.ts

git diff --check -- src/mcp/hermes-na10-command.ts src/mcp/server.ts src/mcp/enhanced-tnf-mcp-server.ts src/mcp/complete-api-mcp-server.ts scripts/hermes-na10-mcp-command.cjs data/mcp.clients/hermes.mcp.json
